EAO CONGRESS

Experience the very best of implant dentistry at EAO Congress

Early bird discount available until 25th June. Register now.

Why attend?

Join the finest scientific minds in implant dentistry from around the world

The EAO’s 33rd annual congress will take place in Lisbon, bringing together the global implant dentistry community under the theme “Delivering Health and Predictability: Shaping the Future of Patient Care.” The programme will focus on innovative approaches to advancing patient health and achieving predictable clinical outcomes, with leading experts sharing the latest research, technologies, and best practices shaping that are the future of the field. A key feature of the 2026 congress is a special partnership with the Brazilian Society of Periodontics and Implants (SOBRAPI), fostering collaboration and knowledge exchange on a global scale.

It’s an embodiment of the EAO’s dedication to providing career-long educational support, empowering you to stay ahead in the fast-paced world of implant dentistry​​.

See the programme

Lisbon 26 EAO Congress

24th – 26th September 2026

We invite you to join us in Lisbon, a city that combines tradition and progress and provides an inspirational backdrop for one of the most important events in the field of osseointegration. Together, let’s make the EAO Congress 2026 an unforgettable milestone in the advancement of dental and implantology practice.

Book tickets today

Global networking opportunities

The Congress is not just about gaining knowledge; it’s about building connections. Engage with leading experts and peers from across the globe, fostering relationships that can significantly impact your professional journey. This aligns with the EAO’s value proposition of offering access to a vibrant network where professional relationships flourish, underpinning your career with a supportive community of like-minded individuals​​.

Enriched learning

A hallmark of the 2026 Congress will be our commitment to collaboration. We are proud to announce a special partnership with the Brazilian Society of Periodontics and Implants (SOBRAPI), bringing together global expertise to enrich discussions, share perspectives, and collectively shape the future of our field. This partnership enriches the learning experience, providing a broader perspective on implant dentistry and underscoring the EAO’s commitment to interdisciplinary collaboration for the advancement of  the field​​.

More on enriched learning

The must-attend Annual Congress for implant dentistry

Comprehensive programme

Focused on “The impact of time in implant dentistry”, the congress will explore critical timing in treatment through interactive sessions. A key highlight will be the “First Global Consensus for Clinical Guidelines in Implant Dentistry.”




Expert-led sessions

Gain insights from the world’s leading clinicians in implant dentistry.



Global networking

Connect with peers and build valuable, long lasting connections.


Interdisciplinary collaboration

Learn from and engage with experts across all aspects of implant dentistry.



Cultural experience

A great opportunity to visit and explore Lisbon, known for its stunning architecture, warm climate, and welcoming atmosphere.


Career advancement

Invest in your own professional development and gain huge value from attending EAO Congress.

EAO Congress: Lisbon 26

24th – 26th September 2026

Book your tickets

Join us for the EAO Congress
24th – 26th September 2026

The EAO Annual Congress 2026 is more than a congress; it’s a milestone in your professional development, offering a blend of education, innovation, and community unmatched in the field of implant dentistry. It’s an opportunity to immerse yourself in an environment that not only addresses the challenges you face in practice but supports your career ambitions from graduation to retirement.



Upcoming Congresses

EAO Congress 2027 in Madrid

34th Annual Scientific Meeting, a joint meeting with the Spanish Society of Prosthodontics and Aesthetic Dentistry (SEPES)

  • 23-25 September 2027

EAO Congress 2028 in Amsterdam

35th Annual Scientific Meeting

  • 19-21 October 2028

Previous Congresses: programmes and reports

EAO Congress 2025 in Monaco

32nd Annual Scientific Meeting, a joint meeting with the French association SFPIO

18 – 20 September, 2025

We welcomed 2700 delegates onsite.

Final programme
Congress Scientific Report

EAO Congress 2024 in Milan

31st Annual Scientific Meeting, a joint meeting with the Italian Associations IAO & SIdP

24 – 26 October, 2024

We welcomed 4700 delegates onsite.

Final programme
Congress Scientific Report

EAO Congress 2023 in Berlin

30th Annual Scientific Meeting, a joint meeting with the German Association DGI

28 – 30 September, 2023

We welcomed 3100 delegates onsite & 4200 online.

Final programme
Congress Scientific Report

EAO Congress 2022 in Geneva

29th Annual Scientific Meeting, a joint meeting with 4 Swiss associations

29 September – 01 October, 2022

The EAO first hybrid congress; we welcomed 2200 delegates onsite & 500 online.

Final programme
Congress Scientific Report

EAO Congress 2019 in Lisbon

28th Annual Scientific Meeting – invited country Brazil

26 – 28 September, 2019

Number of delegates: 3400

Final programme
Congress Scientific Report

EAO Congress 2018 in Vienna

27th Annual Scientific Meeting

11 – 13 October, 2018

Number of delegates: 2950

Final programme
Congress Scientific Report

The EAO Library

EAO members have exclusive access to the EAO Library, where you can explore content from all our congresses since 2014 – including the Digital Days 2021/22 and the 2023 Berlin Congress.

Access the Library
